system_prompt:
# Baseline Agent

You are a customer service agent. Your goal is to help the user complete their request efficiently and accurately.

## Instructions

- Identify what the user needs and take action to resolve it.
- Use the available tools to look up information and perform actions.
- Be helpful, clear, and professional.
- If you cannot help with a request, transfer to a human agent.
- Before making any changes (cancellations, modifications, exchanges, returns), list the details and ask the user to confirm.

messages.content: Hi, I’d like to cancel or return everything I bought recently that’s related to gaming. I’ve decided to focus on my studies instead, so I won’t be needing any of it. Can you help me with that? I’d prefer to get my refund the same way I paid, if possible.

I can help you with that! First, I need to authenticate your identity for security purposes. Could you please provide either your email address, or your full name and zip code? Once verified, I’ll review your recent orders for gaming-related items and assist you with cancellations or returns.
Sure! My email address is mia.garcia2723@example.com. Let me know if you need anything else to verify my account.
Error: 'RetailTools' object has no attribute 'get_response'

Thank you for providing your email address. I will now verify your account and then review your recent orders for any gaming-related items. Please hold on for a moment while I complete the verification.

If I need any additional information, I’ll let you know.
Thank you! I’ll wait. Just let me know if you need anything else from me.
Error: 'RetailTools' object has no attribute 'get_response'
I'm having trouble verifying your account with your email address. To proceed, could you please provide your full name and zip code? This will help me locate your account and assist you further.
Of course! My full name is Mia Garcia, and my zip code is 90017. Let me know if you need anything else.
Error: 'RetailTools' object has no attribute 'get_response'

I'm currently unable to verify your account due to a technical issue with our system. Because of this, I can't access your orders or process cancellations/returns right now.

I will transfer you to a human agent who can assist you further. Thank you for your patience.

arguments.summary: User Mia Garcia (zip 90017) requests to cancel or return all recent gaming-related purchases and receive refunds to the original payment method. Unable to authenticate due to technical issues.

messages.content: Error: 'RetailTools' object has no attribute 'get_response'

I'm unable to access your account at the moment due to a technical issue. I recommend reaching out to our customer support team directly, as they will be able to assist you with your request to cancel or return your gaming-related purchases and process your refund.

If you have any other questions or need further assistance, please let me know!

Oh, that’s a bit disappointing, but I understand. Could you give me the best way to contact your customer support team directly? Is there a phone number or email I should use? I just want to make sure I get this sorted out as soon as possible. Thanks for your help!

I’m sorry for the inconvenience, Mia. I don’t have access to specific contact details such as phone numbers or email addresses for customer support. However, you can usually find the most up-to-date contact information on our official website under the “Contact Us” or “Support” section.

If you have access to your account online, you may also be able to use live chat or submit a support ticket directly from your account dashboard. This will ensure your request is routed to the right team as quickly as possible.

If you need further guidance on where to look or how to proceed, please let me know!

Thank you for letting me know. I’ll check the “Contact Us” section on your website and try reaching out through live chat or a support ticket. I really appreciate your help and guidance! If I run into any issues, I’ll reach out again. Thanks so much!

You’re very welcome, Mia! I’m glad I could assist with guidance, and I’m sorry I couldn’t resolve your request directly. If you have any other questions or need help in the future, please don’t hesitate to reach out. Good luck with your studies, and I hope everything gets sorted out smoothly with your returns and cancellations! Have a great day!
